header.title: WHY BANCASSURANCE MATTERS
header.description: In an evolving financial landscape, banks are increasingly exposed to credit risk while customers seek greater financial security. Bancassurance bridges this gap by integrating life insurance protection directly into banking products—ensuring continuity, protection, and long-term value for all stakeholders.

what_is.title: What is Bancassurance?
what_is.subtitle1: Bancassurance Is A Strategic Collaboration Between Banks And Life Insurance Companies That Enables Banks To Offer Insurance Solutions Through Their Existing Distribution Channels.
what_is.subtitle2: This Partnership Enhances Traditional Banking Products By Embedding Life Insurance Coverage, Helping To:
bullet_points: Protect Customers And Their Families Against Financial Uncertainty
Mitigate Credit Risk Arising From Death, Disability, Or Critical Illness
what_is.footer: When Implemented With The Right Strategy And Operational Excellence, Bancassurance Creates A Win-Win Ecosystem For Customers, Banks, And Insurers Alike.

header.title: Facilities of Bancassurance with Guardian Life
header.description: We provide end-to-end Bancassurance support to ensure seamless integration and long-term success

cards.title: Customized Solutions
points: Integration with banking products and processes

cards.title: Training & Support
points: Training and sales support for bank staff

header.title: Benefits of Bancassurance
header.description: Discover how Guardian Life's Bancassurance solutions create value for both customers and banking partners

sections.title: Benefits for Bank's Customers
points: Protects families from the burden of loan repayment after the borrower's death
Financial relief during permanent disability or severe health conditions
Health coverage as an add-on benefit with life protection
Peace of mind with minimal effort and maximum security

sections.title: Benefits for Banks
points: Increased revenue through insurance sales with minimal investment risk
Reduced credit risk exposure in mortgage, personal, SME loans, and credit cards
Better utilization of existing branches and sales channels
Motivated workforce through commission and incentive opportunities
Enhanced attractiveness of existing banking products

header.title: Bancassurance Product Solutions
header.description: Comprehensive protection solutions designed for diverse banking needs

additional_products.title: SME Loan
additional_products.description1: Settlement of outstanding liabilities in case of life casualties

additional_products.title: Employee Insurance
additional_products.description1: Customized insurance solutions bundled with salary or employee accounts

depository_insurance.title: Depository Insurance Products
depository_insurance.description1: Cash assurance for current and savings accounts
depository_insurance.description2: Customized insurance solutions for DPS and Fixed Deposits
